currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Context Budget Ledger v1 is accepted locally: Context Packet reports estimated size, budget level, heavy sections, and compression advice without real tokenizer dependency.

doneWhenChecklist.label: Context Budget Ledger v1 schema 已定义并从 domain 导出
runtime 可以从 Context Packet 内容生成 budget ledger
Context Packet 自动携带 budget ledger
过大的 section 会产生明确 warnings 和 compression advice

knownGaps: Budget estimates are intentionally heuristic in v1 and should not claim exact model token counts.
No tokenizer, embedding, RAG, UI surface, or model API integration is in scope.
Budget ledger should make oversized packets visible before role-specific packets are introduced.
